Lifeism is a new religion being founded as we speak. [[Lifeism Wiki|This wiki]] serves the purpose of documenting it and helping people with terminology and ideas and how they connect. This wiki is not authoritative and you should go to https://evolution.faith for authoritative info. This wiki may contain errors or obsolete info and is actively being worked on.

The Wiki is a fair bit more in depth and well done now as [[Reacting to the Meaning Crisis]] really helped with putting attention to it. 

[[Category:Lifeism Wiki]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
